commands.review_summary:
The branch makes scoped plugin commands fail closed without gateway scopes unless the sender is a command owner, adds `operator.pairing` and an early guard to device-pair `/pair`, forwards Discord owner status, updates regression tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows `requiredScopes` are skipped without gateway scope context, and `/pair status`/`pending` run before any device-pair pairing-scope guard.
